title: ASR Outdoor 5lb Madagascar Gemstone Mining Kit Geology Paydirt Classifier and ID
description:
Learn how to pan for gold with this six piece ASR Outdoor gold pan kit for beginners. This exciting new prospecting starter gold panning kit includes engineered gold paydirt by professional prospector Bobby Bo. With this kit, you'll be able to learn and practice gold panning techniques at home without having to travel to a claim site. The ASR Outdoor six piece gold panning kit is an excellent option for kids and beginners who are just getting started in gold prospecting. Inside the kit, we’ve included six essential prospecting equipment tools to learn the basics of gold panning. You'll find a 10" dual riffle gold pan that will help you start identifying and collecting gold

ASR Outdoor 5lb Madagascar Gemstone Mining Kit Geology Paydirt Classifier and ID

Whether you’re a seasoned prospector or just getting started with mining and geology hobbies, the ASR Outdoor Gemstone Mining Kit comes with essential items to enjoy the thrill of sifting through paydirt and identifying precious minerals! You’ll find (1) 5lb bag of assorted rough gemstones (from Madagascar), an identification chart, and a plastic sieve inside the kit.

Key Features

  • 5LB GEMSTONE PAYDIRT KIT - This ASR Outdoor Gemstone Mining Kit comes with essential items to enjoy the thrill of sifting through paydirt and identifying precious minerals: a 5 pound bag of assorted rough gemstone paydirt (Madagascar), a gemstone identification chart and a plastic sieve
  • TOP QUALITY GEMSTONES - In your paydirt, you’ll discover an assortment of rough gemstones, all sourced from Madagascar.
  • PLASTIC SAND SIFTER - The kit comes with a 9.75” x 9.75” classifying sieve ideal for sifting through your gemstones and paydirt. The sieve has 36 holes per square inch, comes with convenient handles, and is made of durable plastic ideal for use in any weather
  • IDENTIFICATION CHART - Included is a gemstone identification chart so you can easily identify the gems from your rough mix bags, and the chart is laminated so you can take it with you to identify precious gems out in the field
  • SPECIFICATIONS - 5lbs gemstones (Madagascar); Dimensions of classifier pan: 9.75” x 9.75”; Color of sieve (ships at random); Materials: rocks, gemstones, and plastic; Sieve has handles, stackable design

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRO3PCGMKTMDG
  • UPC: 810131709808
  • Color: Assorted
  • Size: 3pc

Our five pound ASR Outdoor Madagascar rough gemstone paydirt bag is a cornucopia of excitement and discovery, with at least two pounds of gemstones. Packed with a great variety of authentic and genuine Madagascar gemstones, as well as smaller tumbled stones, the thrill of sifting through paydirt and identifying precious gemstones awaits! We’ve also included a gemstone identification chart to easily identify the gems from your rough mix bags, making this a great tool for beginners.

Lastly, we’ve added a high-quality, durable plastic classifying sifter to easily sift through your gemstones and paydirt. The sieve features a stackable design and comes with convenience handles to make sifting a breeze. This is a great gift set idea for prospectors, gemstone enthusiasts, and kids who are studying geology!
